Short title and commencement- (1) These rules may he called the National Highways Fee (Determination of' Rates and Collection) Third Amendment Rules 2014. . (2) Thesy shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the National Highways 'Fee (Determination of Rates and Collection) Rules, 2008 (hereinafter refened to as the principal rules I> in rule lOaf the principal rule after sub-rule 1(A) the followi ug provision shall be inserted.
